---
applyTo: "**/*.tsx,**/*.ts,**/*.css"
description: "Apply Tailwind utility best practices for clarity, responsiveness, and consistency."
---

# Tailwind Best Practices

Apply these rules when editing Tailwind-based UI:

- Keep utility classes inline unless patterns are reused multiple times.
- Group related utilities for readability: layout, spacing, typography, color, effects.
- Prefer responsive utilities over custom media queries.
- Use project design tokens and theme colors instead of random hard-coded values.
- Break long class strings across lines when needed for readability.
- Keep class ordering consistent across components.
